protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: “collected samples were centrifuged… and the supernatants were filtered… [and] phage particles were precipitated… [and] CsCl density gradient ultracentrifugation… at 4°C”

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: “2% uranyl acetate… applied and washed with ultrapure water.”

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: “phage particles were treated with DNase I and RNase A at 37°C… The overall isolation and purification… were conducted according to Wilcox et al. and Sambrook and Russell.”

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: “phage stock… suspended in loading buffer… 1.6% SDS”

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: “denatured phage proteins were… separated using… SDS-polyacrylamide gel… [gel pieces] destained… dehydrated… rehydrated… digested with trypsin”

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: “Reconstituted infant formula milk was prepared… [bacteria and] phage CR5… were added to… infant formula milk… incubated with shaking… viable cells… counted”
